subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the Most Mighty Cord! I have read thy words of gratitude and the clear tokens of thy yearning for God and thy supplication unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعروه وثقی قد تلوت بیان شکرک و بینات شوقک الی الله و توسلک الیه و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action
